mapper.sql: id, care_plan_id, period_number, period_start_date, period_end_date, required_services, completed_services, approved_services, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM care_plan_period WHERE care_plan_id = #{carePlanId} ORDER BY period_number ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO care_plan_period ( care_plan_id, period_number, period_start_date, period_end_date, required_services, completed_services, approved_services, status ) VALUES
(#{item.carePlanId}, #{item.periodNumber}, #{item.periodStartDate}, #{item.periodEndDate}, #{item.requiredServices}, #{item.completedServices}, #{item.approvedServices}, #{item.status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM care_plan_period WHERE care_plan_id = #{carePlanId}
SELECT FROM care_plan_period WHERE care_plan_id = #{carePlanId} AND status = 'PENDING' AND CURDATE() BETWEEN period_start_date AND period_end_date ORDER BY period_number ASC LIMIT 1
